source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, $AD$ is the median of $\triangle ABC$. It is known that the perimeter of $\triangle ABD$ is $25\,\text{cm}$, and $AB$ is $7\,\text{cm}$ longer than $AC$. What is the perimeter of $\triangle ACD$?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text:
\textbf{Solution:} Since $AD$ is the median of $\triangle ABC$,\\
it follows that $BD=CD$,\\
therefore, the difference in the perimeters of $\triangle ABD$ and $\triangle ACD$ is $(AB+BD+AD)-(AC+CD+AD)=AB-AC$.\\
Since the perimeter of $\triangle ABD$ is $25\,cm$ and $AB$ is $7\,cm$ longer than $AC$,\\
the perimeter of $\triangle ACD$ is: $25-7=\boxed{18}\,(cm)$.

image_dependency: 题干显式说“As shown in the figure”，且 requires_image=true。
asset_registry_record 中有 1 张已登记图片，registry_passed=true。
但题干文字已经给出关键关系“AD is the median of triangle ABC”和所需长度条件，求解主要依赖文字中的几何性质，不明显需要读取图中的额外视觉信息。
multi_step: 需要先由“AD is the median”推出 BD=CD。
再比较两个三角形周长，利用公共边与相等边消去，得到周长差等于 AB-AC。
最后结合“AB is 7 cm longer than AC”和已知周长 25 cm，计算出另一周长 18 cm。
verifiability: 目标答案是单一数值型结果（18 cm），结果形式清晰。
解题过程基于明确的几何定义与代数差值关系，后续可规则化核验。
answer_present=true，且给出的 answer_text 包含完整可检查推导；registry_passed=true。

decision_reasons: 题干、答案和图片资产均已登记且存在，registry_passed=true，没有显式资产缺口。
